name: five-whys
description: Evaluations for five-whys skill trigger accuracy

evals.name: trigger-positive-explicit
evals.description: Skill should trigger for root cause analysis and post-mortems

prompts.input: 帮我做个五个为什么分析
Let's do a 5 whys analysis on this outage
为什么这个 bug 总是反复出现？做个根因分析
prompts.reason: Chinese trigger '为什么总是' + '根因分析'

evals.name: trigger-negative-general
evals.description: Skill should NOT trigger for non-root-cause requests

prompts.input: Create a new API endpoint for user authentication
prompts.reason: Feature implementation, not root cause analysis

prompts.input: 帮我理解 Kubernetes 的网络模型
用第一性原理重新设计我们的支付系统
prompts.reason: First principles redesign, not root cause analysis
